payload.answer: Update the project status to implemented; preserve the earlier planned/open state only as superseded history.

memory_cards.statement: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.
The Brain Slack agent was previously planned and open; that status is superseded by the implemented MVP state.

details: Detected a temporal status transition for the same entity.
Committed the implemented state as current.
Did not treat the previous planned/open state as current.

repair_options: Replace the current status with implemented.
Optionally retain a historical note that the agent was previously planned/open.
